dependencies.governance_relevance: Direct usage of proprietary LLM provider via official SDK.
dependencies.description: OpenAI official API client library dependency.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified OpenAI client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify usage complies with company data privacy policy. Ensure no proprietary data is sent to external LLMs without explicit authorization.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Direct usage of proprietary LLM provider via official SDK.
dependencies.description: Anthropic official API client library dependency.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Anthropic client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Review terms of service for Anthropic models. Verify that data input is not used for model training.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Direct usage of Google AI/Gemini services.
dependencies.description: Google Generative AI or Cloud AI client library dependency.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Google AI client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Review Google Cloud AI core agreements and data storage parameters.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Usage of Azure-hosted OpenAI services, which may have different data privacy guarantees than direct OpenAI usage.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Azure OpenAI client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify Azure tenant configuration and data residency settings for AI services.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Direct usage of Cohere AI services.
dependencies.description: Cohere official API client library dependency.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Cohere client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Ensure custom representations and embeddings generated do not expose sensitive enterprise data.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Usage of Mistral AI services, potentially involving EU data sovereignty.
dependencies.description: Mistral AI official API client library dependency.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Mistral AI client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Check Mistral AI API data sovereignty agreements (especially EU data hosting requirements).

dependencies.governance_relevance: Local LLM execution via Ollama. Lower data leak risk but requires resource monitoring.
dependencies.description: Ollama local LLM client library dependency.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Ollama client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify that Ollama is running in a controlled environment and not exposing local services to the public internet.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Usage of Groq's high-speed inference cloud.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Groq client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Review Groq's data processing agreement for inference workloads.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Usage of Replicate's cloud for running various open-source models.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Replicate client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify which models are being executed on Replicate and their respective licenses.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Usage of Together AI's cloud for model training and inference.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Together AI client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Review Together AI's security and data privacy policies.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Usage of Perplexity's online LLM/search services.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Perplexity client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify that real-time search queries do not leak sensitive context.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Usage of Vercel AI SDK, which abstracts multiple LLM providers.
dependencies.description: Vercel AI SDK client library dependency.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Vercel AI SDK library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify third-party endpoint routing and telemetry. Ensure data flow logs are monitored.

dependencies.governance_relevance: LangChain usage indicates complex LLM workflows and chaining.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified LangChain orchestration framework in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: LangChain pipelines dynamically construct chains. Trace all active prompts and integrations to ensure there are no un-monitored model connections.

dependencies.governance_relevance: LangGraph usage indicates stateful, multi-agent AI systems with potentially high autonomy.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified LangGraph stateful orchestration library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Audit agent graph cycles and tool access permissions to prevent infinite loops or unauthorized data modifications.

dependencies.governance_relevance: LlamaIndex usage indicates RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) patterns.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified LlamaIndex retrieval framework in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: LlamaIndex connects files to LLMs. Audit all document parsing pipelines and local index stores to prevent leaking restricted intellectual property.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Microsoft Semantic Kernel usage, often in enterprise .NET/Python environments.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Semantic Kernel in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Review native function exposures within the Semantic Kernel runtime.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Haystack usage for building production-grade RAG and search systems.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Haystack framework in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify document store security and pipeline component configurations.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Multi-agent systems with autonomous collaboration capabilities.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified CrewAI framework in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Ensure autonomous agent tools do not run uncontrolled system actions or command executions.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Agentic framework that supports autonomous code execution.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified AutoGen framework in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: AutoGen supports execution of code generated by LLMs. Confirm safe sandbox constraints are enabled.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Agentic framework using Pydantic for structured validation.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Pydantic AI framework in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify structured output validation logic and tool definitions.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Hugging Face smolagents for lightweight agentic tasks.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified smolagents library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Review agent tool access and model endpoint usage.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Agno framework (formerly Phidata) for building AI assistants with memory.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Agno framework in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify database persistence and tool security.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Model Context Protocol (MCP) usage for standardized tool/resource exposure to LLMs.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified MCP SDK in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Audit MCP server exposures and client resource access permissions.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Cloud-based vector database usage.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Pinecone vector DB integration in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify that vector payloads do not contain raw plaintext sensitive data. Confirm network connections use TLS.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Vector database usage, could be local or cloud.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Weaviate vector DB integration in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Review local vs cloud Weaviate instance isolation and access authorization keys.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Commonly used for local/embedded vector storage.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Chroma vector DB in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Ensure persistent database directories are located in secure environments. Block unauthorized exports.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Vector search engine usage.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Qdrant client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Check storage parameters for high-dimensional vectors.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Enterprise-grade vector database usage.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Milvus client library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Audit Milvus cluster access and data partition security.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Local, file-based vector indexing.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified FAISS vector DB dependency.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify that raw index files (.index) are stored with adequate filesystem permissions.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Relational database with vector capabilities.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified pgvector dependency.
dependencies.recommended_review: Ensure PostgreSQL database is securely configured.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Deep learning model usage, often involving pre-trained weights from Hugging Face.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified Transformers library in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify model sources and licenses. Be cautious of loading models from untrusted repositories (potential for remote code execution via pickle).

dependencies.governance_relevance: Fundamental deep learning framework.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified PyTorch in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Ensure model training/inference scripts are audited for safe resource usage.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Fundamental deep learning framework.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified TensorFlow/Keras in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Verify model serialization formats and ensure no unsafe model loading from external sources.

dependencies.governance_relevance: Classic machine learning library.
dependencies.evidence_hint: Identified scikit-learn in dependency list.
dependencies.recommended_review: Beware of .pkl files for model loading; use joblib with caution.

env_vars.governance_relevance: High risk of credential leakage for proprietary AI provider.
env_vars.description: Plaintext OpenAI API key variable identifier.
env_vars.evidence_hint: Identified potential plaintext OpenAI API credential key.
env_vars.recommended_review: Never hardcode API keys. Verify that this key is supplied securely at runtime via secrets manager.

prompt_files.description: Dedicated prompt engineering file or configuration.
prompt_files.evidence_hint: Identified dedicated file extension structure for AI prompting templates.
prompt_files.recommended_review: Review prompt content for bias, safety, and proprietary data.

prompt_files.governance_relevance: Naming convention indicates AI system instructions.
prompt_files.description: File or folder containing prompt strings or definitions.
prompt_files.evidence_hint: Detected folder or file with prompt keywords in naming convention.
prompt_files.recommended_review: Verify prompt templates contain standard templates.

prompt_files.governance_relevance: Governance or technical configuration for AI systems.

prompt_files.evidence_hint: Identified AI configuration or governance document.
prompt_files.recommended_review: Review AI system configuration for compliance with internal governance standards.

ml_artifacts.governance_relevance: Binary model weights or serialized model objects.
ml_artifacts.evidence_hint: Detected common machine learning model serialization format.
ml_artifacts.recommended_review: Verify the source of this model. Avoid loading untrusted .pkl/.pt files which may execute arbitrary code.
